issues: rebalance_frequency is 'daily' but spec frequency is 'weekly'

adapter import and usage correct (fetch_weather_series from crazy.adapters.weather_series), and output columns used correctly
allocation logic matches spec allocation_per_signal 5% and max_total_exposure 20% not explicitly enforced but no violation
signal names differ but allowed per instructions
